overview: Maverick Digitals — a premium dark-themed digital marketing agency website for a Mumbai-based agency (founded 2024). Features 5 pages: Home, About, Services, Blog, and Contact, all redesigned with a dark aesthetic matching the Intellix AI agency template style — near-black backgrounds, white text, purple-to-cyan gradient accents, glass-morphism cards, and smooth CSS animations.
features: Dark theme with near-black background and white typography
Purple-to-cyan gradient accents on CTAs and headlines
7 services displayed in a clean card grid
Fully functional contact form connected to backend
Blog with 3 posts and visible thumbnails
Team section with Muskan Rathod and Dhaval Shah
